title: CreateTogether MiniSeason
description: This is a MiniSeason  put together by the members of the Create Together Discord. This modpack is centered around the Create mod and is being used to test mods for the official release of Create Together S1
body:
⚙️ CreateTogether: Mini Season

A collaborative steampunk adventure where creativity, magic, and nature come together.

You awaken in the world of CreateTogether, a realm powered by gears, steam, and imagination.
This Mini Season is a community-built test phase for the upcoming Season 1 Modpack, focused on refining gameplay, testing configurations, and ensuring a smooth and balanced experience for everyone.

You’ll craft, automate, explore, and shape the world — together with fellow inventors.
That’s where your story begins.

🔩 Features

🛠️ Create Mod – Build intricate machines, automate entire factories, and master kinetic engineering.

🪄 Ars Nouveau – Harness the power of magic to craft spells, summon familiars, and enhance your automation with arcane energy.

🪵 Chipped – Expand your creativity with hundreds of new decorative block variants for custom builds and contraptions.

🌄 Terralith – Explore breathtaking landscapes with overhauled world generation, new biomes, and natural wonders.

🦋 Naturalist – Bring your world to life with wildlife, realistic behaviors, and immersive ecosystems.

⚙️ Gameplay Highlights

🔧 Community Testing Phase – Help refine and balance mods before their official inclusion in Season 1.

🧭 Config & Mod Tuning – Experience carefully adjusted settings for performance and progression.

🌿 Collaborative World – Build, explore, and experiment with other players in a shared creative environment.

🚂 Engineering Meets Magic – Combine Create’s machinery with Ars Nouveau’s mystical power for unique automation possibilities.

💡 Season 1 Preview – Be among the first to shape and test the next evolution of CreateTogether.
